name: Denethix Watchguard
flavor_text: The Unyielding Fist posts sentries at every gate. Most of them even stay awake.

validation_errors: Non-creature card has power and/or toughness set
Card has power/toughness but 'Creature' is not in card_types

design_notes: Clean white 1-drop vanilla. 1/2 for {W} is a standard common statline (P+T=3, CMC+3=4, well within budget). White gets small defensive creatures at common. The 1/2 body is useful for blocking early aggression, fitting white's protective role in the set. Flavor ties to Denethix's Unyielding Fist military force.
